question: What is the relation between the water and the building in the image? Select from the following options: (A) The building is towering above the water. (B) The building is located right next to the water. (C) The water is in front of the building, covering it. (D) The reflection of the building can be seen in the water.
gold_answer: The reflection of the building can be seen in the water
answer_choices: The building is towering above the water
The building is located right next to the water
The water is in front of the building, covering it
The reflection of the building can be seen in the water

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: A solid black silhouette with no visible reflections or water surface details
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: Reflections of the building, water surface, or any indication of mirroring

inpaint_prompt_used: A solid black silhouette with no visible reflections or water surface details
negative_prompt_used: Reflections of the building, water surface, or any indication of mirroring
